title: eragrostis indica
intro: Eragrostis indica, also known as Indian Cup Grass or Natal Grass, is a type of grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Eragrostis indica include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Eragrostis indica typically involve boiling the leaves and stems in water to make a tea or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments.
